<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Cursor is at rows 21-22. Need to move it back up to rows 19-20.
# First, let me check the right edge colors at different rows to understand zones.
print("Right edge colors:")
for r in [15, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 25, 30, 40, 50, 60]:
    print(f"  Row {r}: col 63 = '{ascii_lines[r][63]}'")

# Move cursor up to get back to W zone
result = action(['UP'])
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nAfter UP:")
for r in range(18, 23):
    row_str = ascii_lines[r][10:45]
    if any(c not in 'B' for c in row_str):
        print(f"  Row {r}: {row_str}")

# Now click on target again
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 51, 'col': 14}])
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nAfter clicking target:")
print(f"  Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}, Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check grid
print("\nGrid:")
for r in [49,50,51,54,55,56,59,60,61]:
    print(f"  Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][25:39]}")

# Check cursor
print(f"\nCursor:")
for r in range(18, 23):
    row_str = ascii_lines[r][10:45]
    if any(c not in 'B' for c in row_str):
        print(f"  Row {r}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
